item.title: This week on “as the world burns…”
item.description: Turmp’s regime is all about keeping the WWE style story going. The drama, the soap opera of performative outrage… just keep the rednecks glued to their screens. “This will make for great television!” - Turmp after one of his first debates with Biden
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.description: Its been super common the last few years, people have no issue just sharing the worst things possible just assuming I'm of the same mind. Just had to get it out, happy pride everyone

item.title: I always cry when older people support our community.
item.description: This year’s Pride Month marks the 57th anniversary of the Stonewall Uprising in New York City, a series of events between police and LGBTQ+ protesters that stretched over 6 days. This was following a police raid on the Stonewall Inn on June 28, 1969. This was considered the tipping point for the modern LGBTQ+ movement in the United States. Across the country, cities hold Pride events in June. The Howard letterpress uses wood type made by the Hamilton Wood Type Company in the late 1880s. The typeface is French Clarendon and the type is 15 line pica (2.5 inches) in size. This was printed with a gradient of four colors of ink using our Washington hand press, which was manufactured in 1852.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

26 Man Tax: Aaron Altaras
"What really makes one indignant about suffering isn't the thing itself but the senselessness of it." - Nietzsche So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Trump: The Eiffel Tower 1889 it was built. They said we sort of like it, they never took it down and you know we're building something in front of the White House that's quite attractive. And I'm looking at it and maybe we'll never ever take it down.

item.title: Unmanned Systems Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine present: "How to say hello to "St. Petersburg Economic Forum" (i.e. russian propaganda event) with nice fireworks.
item.description: "Ukraine proved that Ukrainian long-range sanctions matter, and since then our ability to bring the war back to Russia has only been growing. And this is fair – in response to everything Russia is doing." - Zelensky

item.title: Rubio: "I assure this is not a president who sleeps or who is cognitively impaired in any way." Lieu: I just showed you three videos of him sleeping.
item.description: Lieu: Instead of holding North Korea style cabinet meetings where everyone kisses Trump’s ass, I’m going to ask you to come clean—there is something wrong with Trump. There’s a reason he keeps going to the hospital and they keep giving him cognitive tests. We have not seen him in eight days.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.description: Hey everyone. I struggled a little bit yesterday with my balance. But i was able to regain quickly and keep going. I hope everyone is doing well. Thank you for everything I really appreciate it.

item.title: Copy Cats DUBBED! [OC]
item.description: Comic dub with the animated pilot voice actors! Sound ON! You're not going to want to miss Vincent's rant! ;) VOICES Joel: J Michael Tatum Vincent: Brittney Karbowski Follow us on YouTube for front row seats when the pilot drops! https://www.youtube.com/@litterboxcomics
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: This post is not just about rejecting AI, and tech, and Silicon Valley psycho-ideals. This post is also about Ari Aster's Eddington.
item.description: Ari Aster wrote the data center stuff into Eddington around 2022? It was filmed in 2024, released July 2025. In my neck of the woods, there wasn't a word about data centers until late last year. That dude had Insane prescience. I mean, it's uncanny and jaw-dropping only one year later. The Re-watches are gonna get weirder and weirder like he predicted the future. The other point of the film is that tech and our smartphones made it so we don't share a reality anymore... not in a small town, not even in one household. We're all fed different crap from these devices, because the data center technocrat AI pushers can keep us divided, distracted, drugged, so we won't fight back. Seems like people are starting to reject all of it, and are fighting back. I promise to stop being existential and post silly memes again.
item.dc:creator: unclefishbits
